label: Transparent sandstone texture motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Sandstone transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a desert sandstone rock texture motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A natural sandstone slab fragment with rose-tan sediment layers, ochre bands, shadow-brown fissures, wind-worn grain, chipped cliff edges, and subtle desert mineral speckles. Geological accuracy, warm documentation identity, clearly stone rather than fabric or parchment.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full slab and layered edge without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no sand dune landscape, no paper scroll, no wood, no brick wall, no fossil focus, no hand, no text, no watermark, no loose gravel pile.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sandstone light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sandstone", derived from a desert sandstone texture cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible documentation UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sandstone, Sandstone Texture, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from rose tan sandstone planes, ochre sediment layers, shadow-brown fissures, pale sand highlights, and wind-worn desert cliff grain. The board must read as sandstone, not parchment, coffee, or generic beige.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: warm documentation system, 8px radius, pale sand reading surfaces, rose sandstone primary actions, ochre highlights, fissure-brown borders, cliff-shadow ink text, stratified section dividers, fine grain texture, spacious docs navigation.
Constraints: no parchment manuscript, no coffee palette, no desert photo hero, no beige-only flat UI, no orange overload, no unrelated neon colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sandstone", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Sandstone dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Sandstone". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the desert sandstone texture cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sandstone, Sandstone Texture, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve rose sandstone active states, ochre charts, fissure-brown dark surfaces, pale sand text, stratified dividers, wind-worn grain texture, documentation hierarchy, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as sandstone, not parchment or coffee.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: cliff-shadow dark backgrounds, fissure-brown cards, pale sand foreground, rose sandstone buttons, ochre status and chart accents, subtle sediment-line texture, crisp documentation controls.
Constraints: no parchment, no espresso palette, no pure-black flat background, no generic orange dashboard, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sandstone".
